functions.name: guesty_status
functions.description: Check whether Guesty Open API credentials are configured and reachable.

functions.name: guesty_search_reservation
functions.description: Search reservations by confirmation code, phone, email or guest name with fuzzy code support.

functions.name: guesty_confirm_reservation
functions.description: Confirm reservation existence and return a safe summary after validation.

functions.name: guesty_confirmed_stay_details
functions.description: Retrieve confirmed stay details including address, check-in, access, Wi-Fi/StayFi, amenities and missing-field diagnostics.

functions.name: guesty_get_reservation
functions.description: Retrieve one reservation by internal Guesty reservation ID.

functions.name: guesty_list_listings
functions.description: List Guesty listings in read-only mode.

functions.name: guesty_available_listings
functions.description: Search available listings by check-in, check-out and guest count.

functions.name: guesty_listing_calendar
functions.description: Retrieve minified listing calendar and nightly pricing.

functions.name: glam_search_public_property_links
functions.description: Search active public Glam Homes direct, Airbnb, Booking or VRBO property links.
